title: Soot-based Taint Analysis Framework
summary: A three-paper chain implementing a Java static analysis framework. Soot provides the intermediate representation and call graph construction. FlowDroid builds IFDS-based taint analysis for detecting data leaks. StubDroid adds automatic library summary generation for performance.
instructionPreview: Implement a static analysis framework for Java-like programs in Python. Working directory: /workspace (contains program_model.py, utils.py, benchmarks/, run.sh).
instruction:
Implement a static analysis framework for Java-like programs in Python.
Working directory: /workspace (contains program_model.py, utils.py, benchmarks/, run.sh).

Implement three modules in topological order:

1. soot_analysis.py — Jimple-like IR (JimpleStatement, JimpleBody), CHA call graph
   construction, Scene registry, copy propagation, and dead code elimination.

2. flowdroid_analysis.py — IFDS-based forward taint analysis with AccessPath,
   TaintFact, Leak, SourceSinkManager, AliasAnalysis, lifecycle-aware propagation.
   Imports from soot_analysis.

3. stubdroid_analysis.py — Automatic library method summary generation
   (SummaryGenerator, SummaryFlow, MethodSummary), XML serialization,
   SummaryTaintWrapper, SummaryAwareTaintAnalysis. Imports from both prior modules.

Update run.sh to execute all three modules with PYTHONHASHSEED=0.

Each module must be runnable standalone (python3 <module>.py) and output KEY: VALUE
experiment results. See requirements/ for detailed specifications.

moduleDag.description: A three-paper chain implementing a Java static analysis framework. Soot provides the intermediate representation and call graph construction. FlowDroid builds IFDS-based taint analysis for detecting data leaks. StubDroid adds automatic library summary generation for performance.

nodes.label: Soot: A Java Bytecode Optimization Framework
nodes.description: Jimple-like IR, CHA call graph construction, copy propagation, and dead code elimination for Java-like programs.

nodes.label: FlowDroid: Precise Taint Analysis for Android Apps
nodes.description: IFDS-based forward taint analysis with access paths, alias analysis, lifecycle-aware propagation, and leak detection.

nodes.label: StubDroid: Automatic Library Summary Inference
nodes.description: Automatic method summary generation, XML serialization, summary-based taint wrapper, and summary-aware analysis.
